name: Daily Ingest - By Source
description: Drill-down into daily ingest by input source — top sources table and time series charts.

config.query: dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="MB" | union (dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="GB") | union (dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="TB") | sort by unit asc

search.query: dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="MB" | union (dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="GB") | union (dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="TB") | sort by unit asc

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric in ("total.in_bytes","total.in_events") dist_mode in ("worker","managed-edge")
| where isnotnull(input)
| summarize events_in=sum(iff(metric=="total.in_events",value,0)), bytes_in=sum(iff(metric=="total.in_bytes",value,0)) by input, worker_group
| extend divisor=case("$byte_unit"=="MB", 1048576, "$byte_unit"=="TB", 1099511627776, 1073741824)
| extend bytes_in_scaled=round(bytes_in / divisor, 2)
| project input, worker_group, events_in, bytes_in_scaled
| sort by bytes_in_scaled desc
| limit 20

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric="total.in_bytes" dist_mode in ("worker","managed-edge")
| where isnotnull(input)
| extend divisor=case("$byte_unit"=="MB", 1048576, "$byte_unit"=="TB", 1099511627776, 1073741824)
| summarize bytes_in=sum(value / divisor) by _time=bin(_time, 1h), input
| timestats sum(bytes_in) by input

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric="total.in_events" dist_mode in ("worker","managed-edge")
| where isnotnull(input)
| summarize events_in=sum(value) by _time=bin(_time, 1h), input
| timestats sum(events_in) by input
